title: RampageX
description: RampageX is a powerful Minecraft plugin that tracks player killstreaks and rewards players with configurable effects, items, XP, commands, and messages, featuring anti kill-farming measures, penalties, leaderboards, and customizable commands.
body:
RampageX is a powerful and customizable killstreak tracking plugin designed to enhance PvP gameplay on your Minecraft server. It tracks player killstreaks with precise, thread-safe storage and offers a wide range of configurable rewards — including potion effects, items, XP, commands, and messages — triggered at killstreak milestones. With built-in anti kill-farming measures, death penalties, and optional leaderboard and scoreboard displays, RampageX promotes fair and exciting combat experiences.

Ideal for server admins seeking flexible, engaging PvP progression and reward mechanics, RampageX also supports extensive command controls and offers plans for GUI management, economy integration, and advanced reward conditions.
